prompt: A high-end, photorealistic POV shot from a passenger seat inside a futuristic luxury train. On a sleek, dark wood folding table sits an eclectic mix of food: a modern glass container with home-cooked meal, a rustic paper bag with golden station pastries, and a premium cup of instant noodles. A smartphone is held in a natural, clean hand, pointing its camera at the food. A subtle, elegant teal and blue neon holographic interface glows around the food items on the phone screen, displaying abstract data visualizations and circular progress rings. The lighting is a blend of warm sunset light through the train window and cool cyan ambient accents. Cinematic depth of field, 8k resolution, premium lifestyle photography style.
negative_prompt: text, letters, numbers, words, watermark, logo, QR code, brand name, distorted fingers, extra digits, blurry face, messy environment, cheap plastic, low resolution, flat lighting
notes: Combined the 'travel' theme with the app's core 'photo-to-data' mechanic.
Used 'luxury train' and 'dark wood' to maintain the premium brand aesthetic from the references.
Specified 'teal and blue neon' to align with the FoodFlow color palette.
Ensured the food variety (home-cooked, pastry, noodles) matches the post's narrative of mixed travel meals.
